title: Manufacturing Engineering Intern
bullets: Utilized computer-aided design software for equipment/tool design and finite element analysis.
Built Power BI dashboards tracking scrap rate and operator efficiency, enabling data-driven decisions for production.
Automated production management workflows using VBA and Power Automate.
Applied Six Sigma and Kaizen methodologies across assembly and CNC/fab departments, targeting cycle time and waste reduction.
Designed and programmed a PLC-controlled oil/water skimming system, reducing manual oversight in pre-paint washing operations.
Rolled out a CMMS platform, standardizing preventive maintenance scheduling and strengthening regulatory/safety compliance.

title: Maintenance Engineering Intern
bullets: Supported maintenance inventory control processes, including stock tracking and part procurement.
Processed and prioritized maintenance work orders using SAP ERP.
Created SOPs and work instructions for machines, standardizing safe operating procedures across shifts.
